operational_knowledge_units.title: Aviva access restrictions and UPS-mediated communication
operational_knowledge_units.summary: Fortna support lacks direct Aviva access; only UPS users can access. PC does not communicate with Aviva. Coordinate with a UPS operator to obtain Aviva observations during troubleshooting.
observed_evidence: “We don't have the access to Aviva.”
“anybody ... not a UPS ... doesn't have access to Aviva.”
relationships: requires: UPS operator to relay Aviva status
excludes: direct Fortna/PC access to Aviva
boundary: PC and Aviva are separate systems
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: No direct Aviva access for Fortna/PC; only UPS users. For Aviva details, work through a UPS operator. PC does not communicate with Aviva.

operational_knowledge_units.title: First-response diagnostic step: check RMS system faults
operational_knowledge_units.summary: On any issue, first open the RMS screen and check for system faults; this is the first step during a support call before deeper triage.
observed_evidence: “first thing first, go to that RMS screen”
“This should always be your first step on a phone call.”
relationships: first_step: use RMS faults before deeper triage
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Initial triage: open RMS screen and check for system faults before escalating or requesting Aviva checks.
